title: The Third Blood
subtitle: “What you bleed isn't antifreeze, it's the third blood that maintains balance.”
description: A profile of 1738's psychological alienation. Between black and white, what price did the mediator truly pay?
synopsis:
Lu Qingxian was injured, but he felt no pain.

The former organization spent a long time stripping away his fear and empathy, turning him into an absolutely rational observer. As he watched his own dark red blood flow out on the rooftop, a message arrived from the watcher 36,000 kilometers away.
